hook_type: Identity-then-FOMO: 'you do this, 137K do it bigger'
tactic: Shopping-to-ownership bridge with hard community number -> mechanism reveal -> recursion
primary_text:
You back Aussie brands when you shop. 137,000 Australians do it with ownership too.

That is Crowd-Sourced Funding, and Birchal is the platform. Since 2018 we have helped 324 Australian companies raise over $234M. Naked Life. Our Cow. Medigrowth.

Now we are opening our own raise.

Save your spot. Read the offer when it opens.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: Australians who back Aussie brands
description: You buy from them already. Now you can own a piece.
_v3_changes: Hook rewrite: 'You vote with your wallet every time you buy from an Aussie brand. We let you vote with ownership.' -> 'You back Aussie brands when you shop. 137,000 Australians do it with ownership too.' Real number anchors the FOMO; 'do it with ownership too' implies the reader is missing what 137K already do. Halbert 3->4.
Cut metaphorical 'vote with your wallet' / 'vote with ownership' -- specificity beats metaphor (Hopkins' law).
_drc_audience: B2C considered, solution-aware. First-time CSF investors who self-identify as backing Australian-made.
_a_pile_signals: stakes named (do it with ownership too = you don't yet)
_compliance_findings_resolved: VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: 'Read the offer when it opens'.
